_readme: This controls the 'লাইভ দেখুন' (Watch Live) button. IMPORTANT HONESTY NOTE: there is no single global free legal source for every match - free vs paid depends on your country and which league. type 'link' opens an official/legal source in a new tab. type 'embed' should ONLY ever be used with a genuinely OFFICIAL embeddable stream URL (e.g. FIFA's own official YouTube live embed) - never an unofficial/pirated stream. Rules are checked top to bottom, first match wins; match.competition checks the competition code (WC, PL, CL, PD, BL1, SA, FL1, DED, PPL, ELC, BSA, EC), match.teamContains checks team names, match.stage checks the match stage.

rules._comment: World Cup 2026 is free-to-air in Bangladesh on T Sports - confirmed free, no subscription needed.
rules.label: T Sports এ ফ্রি দেখুন

_howToAddOfficialEmbed: Example, only with a real official embeddable URL: { "label": "অফিসিয়াল লাইভ দেখুন", "type": "embed", "url": "https://www.youtube.com/embed/VIDEO_ID", "match": { "stage": "FINAL" } }
_clubFootballNote: For club football (Premier League, La Liga, etc) after the World Cup, free full-match broadcasters vary week to week and country to country - there usually isn't a single fixed free channel. The default link above sends viewers to a legal 'where to watch' finder instead of guessing wrong. Add specific rules here if you find a reliable free source for your country.
